steps.t: A sign of what drove away the people of Dunfast may be on the outskirts of town. You should search the outskirts of Dunfast for a sign of the forces o…
Signs of Núrzum's presence can be found at the ice-spire outside of Dunfast. You should examine signs of Núrzum's presence.
Cyneberg can be found in Dunfast. You should return to Cyneberg.
